html:
Exclusive to:  

The Spyglass is a craftable Nautical Tab Item in the Shipwrecked DLC. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and is crafted using 1 Empty Bottle, 1 Pig Skin, and 1 Gold Nugget. It is also a reward from the Yaarctopus in exchange for Ceviche.

When equipped, it can be peered through to reveal a cone-shaped portion of the map in the direction the player clicks with Right Mouse Button (RMB).

The range Spyglass will reveal changes by the time of Day, farthest being during day time. The range is also reduced on boats, and during Hurricane Season.

Super Spyglass

The Super Spyglass is a better version of the Spyglass with doubled map reveal range. It can be crafted using a Spyglass, an Eye of the Tiger Shark and a Gold Nugget. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and can be blown away by Strong Winds.

The range reduction while on a boat doesn't apply to it, but the range is still affected by the time of day.

Either version can be found in X Marks the Spot treasure chests.

Downloadable Content

In the Hamlet DLC, there is a chance for Spyglass to spawn in a Secret Bandit Camp.

Usage

Tips

  • The distance revealed by the Spyglass can be sailed in a short amount of time with boats, so it is recommended to use it to peek towards other directions that the player does not travel into.

Bugs

  • On console editions, having a Boat Lantern equipped prevents the use of Spyglasses while at sea. Removing the lantern will allow normal use of the spyglass. This bug also affects other hand-held equipment that have a cursor (such as the Volcano Staff) from being used while on a boat.

Trivia

Old Super Spyglass icon.
  • The art for the Super Spyglass was changed in the Eye of the Tiger Shark update to reflect it being craftable with an Eye of the Tiger Shark.

Gallery

  • Range Comparison
    (Normal Spyglass on the left and Super Spyglass on the right)
  • Wilson holding a Spyglass.
  • Wilson holding a Super Spyglass.
  • Wilson using a Spyglass.
  • Wilson using a Super Spyglass.
  • Walani using a Super Spyglass, as seen in the Shipwrecked trailer.
  • Super Spyglass as seen in the poster for the Eye of the Tiger Shark update.
DSTDSRoGSWHam

–Wilson

–Wendy

–WX-78
“It collects visible light to better my vision.”
–Wickerbottom
“Helps my eyesight, eh?”
–Woodie
“This may help me get the lay of the land.”
–Maxwell
“The glass bottle makes an uncommonly good looking glass.”
–Wagstaff
“What trickery is this?”
–Wigfrid
“I can see so far!”
–Webber
“You can't hide from me, islands!”
–Walani
“To see how "near" I am to "far".”
–Warly
“Aye eye!”
–Woodlegs
“WHATFORE WILBA SEE INSIDE?”
–Wilba
“Looky look”
–Wormwood
“I could see farther that this if I was up in my balloon.”
–Wheeler

–Woodie
“This may help me get the lay of the land.”
–Maxwell

–Wagstaff
“Ödin has lent me his eye!”
–Wigfrid
“Helps us see better than with all our eyes, combined!”
–Webber
“I can super sea!!”
–Walani
“I knew sharks had an exceptional sense of smell, but their vision!”
–Warly
“Eye see clear ta th'horizon!”
–Woodlegs
“WILBA CAN'ST O'ER-PEER THE OCEANS”
–Wilba
“Can see home?”
–Wormwood
“I can almost see all the danger from here.”
–Wheeler

It can be crafted using a Spyglass, an [[Eye of the Tiger Shark]] and a Gold Nugget. It requires a Science Machine to prototype and can be blown away by [[Strong Winds]]. The range reduction while on a boat doesn't apply to it, but the range is still affected by the time of day. Either version can be found in [[X Marks the Spot]] treasure chests. {{clear}} ==[[File:Gift Icon.png|32px]] Downloadable Content == In the ''[[Don't Starve: Hamlet|Hamlet]]'' DLC, there is a chance for Spyglass to spawn in a [[Secret Bandit Camp]]. == {{pic|32|Icon Tools}} Usage == {{Recipe |item1 = Spyglass |item2 = Gold Nugget |item3 = Eye of the Tiger Shark |tool = Science Machine |result = Super Spyglass}} == {{Pic|32|Prototype}} Tips == * The distance revealed by the Spyglass can be sailed in a short amount of time with boats, so it is recommended to use it to peek towards other directions that the player does not travel into. == {{Pic32|Mosquito}} Bugs == * On console editions, having a Boat Lantern equipped prevents the use of Spyglasses while at sea. Removing the lantern will allow normal use of the spyglass. This bug also affects other hand-held equipment that have a cursor (such as the Volcano Staff) from being used while on a boat. == {{pic|32|Placeholder}} Trivia == [[File:Super Spyglass outdated.png|thumb|Old Super Spyglass icon.]] * The art for the Super Spyglass was changed in the ''Eye of the Tiger Shark'' update to reflect it being craftable with an [[Eye of the Tiger Shark]]. {{clear}} =={{Pic|32|Blueprint}} Gallery== Spyglass Range Comparison.jpg|Range Comparison
